findings.description: PascalCase class names appearing in the Action class implementation example are missing from hints: HttpResponse, HttpRequest, ExecutionContext, W11AC03Form. These are referenced in the Java code example and could be used by users as search terms.
findings.source_evidence: Source Java code: `public HttpResponse doRW11AC0304(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx)` and `ValidationContext<W11AC03Form> formCtx = ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest("W11AC03", W11AC03Form.class, req, "updateUser")`
